items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the visibility of the date of last inspection.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that the 'Date of last inspection' is visible on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for the date to be visible, but there is no concrete evidence or endpoints provided to verify this aspect, leading to an inconclusive status.
